---
title: "Jane Augusta Merriman"
---

## Jane Augusta Merriman

**Dates:** (1828/9-1896)

**Maiden name:** (Edmonds)

### Description

wife of the Rev.Henry Merriman

### Biography

She married (1852)  the Rev. Henry Gordon Merriman (1823/4-1887), by 1861 headmaster of the Royal Grammar School, Guildford.[census returns, death and marriage index]

### Letters

- Letter from May 7th 1862[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from May 28th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
